title: Join query returns zero results when there is an index on the tables
poc: CREATE INDEX trans_st_idx ON trans (s, t);

SELECT TR.x, TR.z, comp
 FROM 
 (SELECT TR1.u as x, TR1.v as y, TR2.v as z, TR1.r as rxy, TR2.r as ryz
 	FROM
 		R as TR1 JOIN R as TR2 
 	ON (TR1.v = TR2.u AND TR1.u <> TR2.v)
 ) as TR                         
 	JOIN 
  trans
 ON (TR.rxy = s AND TR.ryz = t);
key_bug_features: Join query returns zero results with index present
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE S (a int NOT NULL, b varchar(50), c float);
CREATE TABLE T (x int NOT NULL, y int NOT NULL, z int NULL);
CREATE INDEX T_xy_idx ON T (x, y);
INSERT INTO S (a, b, c) VALUES (1, 'test', 1.5), (2, 'example', 2.5), (3, 'sample', NULL);
INSERT INTO T (x, y, z) VALUES (1, 2, 10), (2, 3, 20), (3, NULL, 30);
